title: How can I import an Excel table with formulas?
excerpt:
How can I import my spreadsheet into a monday.com board and include all of the formulas in the shaded cells? I tried converting the spreadsheet into a table in Excel and then tried to upload it 
  
but that did not work. …

posts.author: edwindt (edwindt)
posts.cookedHtml:
How can I import my spreadsheet into a monday.com board and include all of the formulas in the shaded cells? I tried converting the spreadsheet into a table in Excel and then tried to upload it

MCOM ASK1787×746 132 KB

but that did not work.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @edwindt! I am afraid importing formulas from excel isn’t currently supported. This is a great feature suggestion however and we encourage you to submit this feature via Submit an Idea - monday Community Forum

posts.author: kkovriga (Katerina Kovriga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @edwindt ,

You may try our Smart Spreadsheet for monday app.

You’ll be able to import an existing board to the spreadsheet, then work with the data using all the Excel-like features (cell formulas, pivot tables, filtration, conditional formatting, etc.).

Hope it may help your case at least partly.

Best regards,
Katerina Kovriga, Stiltsoft
